name: Trey Nix, RoyCooper.com
subject: Continue to fight

body:
These complaints are so ridiculous, even Republican-dominated county Board of Elections are unanimously throwing them out.

[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202b3f/2fde7c66/43bcd509/156928ac/500206842/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-mccrorydesperate?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161119_fnd_gq_protec_ful_tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Governor McCrory's team is getting desperate, friends. In an attempt to undermine the results of an election they have lost, they are filing frivolous complaints around the state. These complaints are so ridiculous, even Republican dominated county Board of Elections are unanimously throwing them out. **Governor McCrory has no path to victory, but he isn't conceding. We have to continue to fight until the very end. Chip in today to help us protect this win:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202b3f/2fde7c66/43bcd509/156928af/500206842/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-mccrorydesperate?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161119_fnd_gq_protec_ful_tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5")

---
While the McCrory campaign's false accusations have been rejected, Roy Cooper's lead has grown to nearly 7,500 votes.
It's time for Governor McCrory to respect the will of the voters and stop the desperate attempts to undermine the results of this election.
**[Let's make sure we finish the job.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202b3f/2fde7c66/43bcd509/156928ac/500206842/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-mccrorydesperate?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161119_fnd_gq_protec_ful_tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
Thanks for your support,
Trey Nix
Campaign Manager
Cooper for North Carolina

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: SIGN: Fire Steve Bannon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddc0/2a380d31/145be573/ff33be/2256798591/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddc0/2a380d31/145be573/ff33be/2256798591/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team --
Steve Bannon might not be someone you hear about every day, but he's been making headlines recently, and for good reason:
Bannon, the former head of _Breitbart News_ , is known for his anti-Semitic, bigoted, misogynistic, and homophobic agenda. The latest line on his resume? President-elect Donald Trump's chief strategist.
[**If you believe that each and every American deserves a White House that strives for inclusiveness and tolerance, not one that promotes conspiracy theories and an alt-right agenda, add your name to call on Donald Trump to fire Steve Bannon.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddc0/2a380d31/145be573/ff33bf/2256798591/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/fire-steve-bannon?&source=e20161118_bannon_nh-nd")
Our country just endured one of the most divisive elections in recent memory. Putting the person who ran a website that boasted about being the voice of white nationalists just steps from the Oval Office will only divide us further.
[**Please: Add your name to tell Donald Trump that we can't move forward and begin to bring our country together with someone like Steve Bannon serving alongside our Commander-in-Chief.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddc0/2a380d31/145be573/ff33bf/2256798591/VEsC/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/fire-steve-bannon?&source=e20161118_bannon_nh-nd")
Thank you for making your voice heard,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddc0/2a380d31/145be573/ff33b8/2256798591/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYmFubm9uIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNjExMThfQmFubm9uMV9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bannon?refcode=e20161118_Bannon1_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddc0/2a380d31/145be573/ff33b9/2256798591/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

The latest line on his resume? President-elect Donald Trump's chief strategist. "" Our country just endured one of the most divisive elections in recent memory. name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: The first 100 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Once again, I need you to help craft our platform for America. |

Friend, The election may be over, but our work is just getting started. In 61 days, we begin our mission to Make America Great Again! As I’ve said so many times before, I will not be able to do it alone. I’ll need you to step up and play an active role in fixing our country and enacting our platform for America. Which is why I’m asking you to take the 100-Day Plan of Action Survey, so that we can determine what we MUST accomplish as our first order of business. Our first hundred days in office will set the stage for our entire presidency. The world will be watching every action we take over those first hundred days. It’s incredibly important that we set the right agenda and deliver on our promises to the forgotten men and women of our country. While our transition team is busily assembling our cabinet as I write this to you, I need you to step up and help craft our plan of action for the first hundred days of the TRUMP Administration. Please take our 100-Day Plan of Action Survey to help our transition team set the right agenda for our first few months in office. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President-Elect of the United States of America

Which is why I’m asking you to take the 100-Day Plan of Action Survey, so that we can determine what we MUST accomplish as our first order of business.
